digest.greeting: Jean, today shows a heavy cleanup pass across the dashboard: the Salesforce dependency follow-ups, CoE announcement review, Incident Response loose ends, interview prep, and Jhara's Venn/OneDrive path were all marked complete. A few threads still need tomorrow-facing attention, especially KPI approval, the CoE guide follow-up, and candidate feedback. Buen cierre: a lot moved, and the remaining list is focused.

items.label: PMO/Salesforce dependency response checked off
items.detail: Dashboard items tied to Sara Watson's PMO/Salesforce dependency request were marked complete, including the high-priority response for Shannon and Nadia's Sales Cloud and Revenue Cloud MVP-date context.

items.detail: The CoE announcement draft feedback item from Sara Watson was marked complete in the dashboard state.

items.label: Incident Response follow-ups checked off
items.detail: The dashboard item to follow up with Chelsea and Lucia on Incident Response process loose ends was marked complete.

items.detail: The dashboard marked Jhara's Venn setup priority path and related file-access follow-up items complete.

items.detail: Dar seguimiento a los Team Leads sobre su revision del CoE Brief Guide con sus PMs/PEs. Janet confirmed her team; verify the remaining Team Leads.

items.label: Review IT Request #0027951
items.detail: Mar Garcia and Anu Puri discussed whether the long-waiting request is a Halo ticket to escalate. Jean is copied; confirm whether EPMO needs to help move it.

items.detail: Outlook confirms the Project Coordinator interview for Thursday, June 4 at 11:30 AM EDT with Eugenia Barragan and Jean. Review candidate profile, LinkedIn, resume, and cover letter before the interview.

items.detail: A same-day Teams activity email shows Jhara asking the PM Phase 2 team whether others have the same OneDrive/SharePoint issue and noting Claude suggested Venn may affect OneDrive. Confirm whether a status update or IT path is still needed.
